$schema: Good Measure Design System v3 — machine-readable tokens

$meta.name: Good Measure
$meta.scope: All product surfaces (web app, mobile, marketing). Pages stay; tokens + component internals change.

muted.role: Muted · captions, eyebrows when not inked

rule.role: Hairline · all dividers, card borders, nav rules

person.$comment: Accent only. Surfaces stay paper. Each user owns one. Used for avatar dot, their row in planner, their chip on dashboard.

status.$comment: Warm-shifted. Never neon. Pattern: ink-on-tint pill, never icon+text banner. The legacy --ok/--warn/--err CSS vars are DEPRECATED — map to these values instead.

error.name: Iron-oxide red
error.use: Sync errors, over-limit. Reserve full saturation for actual errors. Do NOT use as button fill.

deprecated.$comment: Old vars present in the spec source for legacy reasons. Do not use; map to the new status palette above.

serif.use: Reserved; not used in current product surfaces

serifDisplay.use: Italic-only, display-only (>=24px), one word at a time. See typography.italicSerifRules.

scale.$comment: THE ONLY sanctioned product type sizes. If a value is not on this ladder, do not ship it. When in doubt, round to the nearest step.

tracking.$comment: As size goes up, tracking gets tighter. Body stays at 0. Caps need air.

rules.rule: Never tighten body. 14px / line 1.55 already breathes.

italicEmphasis.rule: Wrap one or two words max in <em>.

title.use: Page titles like 'Today is Sunday, April 27.'

italicEmphasis.rule: Body italics stay sans. NEVER reach for serifDisplay below 24px.

body.$comment: 13px is the app body size. The spec HTML itself uses 14px for its own layout — that is spec-document-only and not a sanctioned app value.

eyebrow.use: Always uppercase. Mono. Examples: '§ This Week', 'Step 02 / 03'.

italicSerifRules.$comment: Instrument Serif rules of use. Ship as a spice, not a sauce. Wrong-handed it fights DM Sans.
do: Italic only — never set Instrument Serif upright.
One word per headline, rarely two.
dont: Not in body — body italics stay DM Sans italic.
Not as decoration — never for eyebrows, labels, captions, numerals, or wordmark.
Not as global <em> — scope to display contexts only.

radius.rule: No rounded corners on cards, buttons, or inputs. Pills (status only) use 9999px.

patterns.listStagger: Each row: 360ms rise, 80ms delay per item, max stagger window 320ms
patterns.hairlineReveal: scaleX 0→1, transform-origin left, 320ms, after heading enter
patterns.counterTick: opacity + translateY −4px→0, 240ms, on data change, DM Mono tabular-nums
patterns.toast: translateY 12px→0 + opacity 0→1, 200ms ease-out; reverse on dismiss

rules: All transitions use --ease. Never bouncy, never linear except progress bars.
Always respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — replace transitions with instant state changes, keep opacity fades only.
Never animate: body text color, container border-color, anything > 600ms.

wordmark.$comment: Wordmark direction is in flight (separate exploration doc). Until it lands, ship the live upright sans.

current.rule: Do not change the wordmark from this doc.

iconography.rule: The system is type-led. Do NOT add icons or illustrations. Empty and error states are intentionally glyph-free.

mobile.$comment: Three patterns are documented in spec §06; only Pattern B is sanctioned for v0.3.

patternB.name: Editorial rail
patternB.chrome: Wordmark + back arrow in top-left at 14px on every page.
patternB.bottomRail: Single rail with 'Menu' + section index, e.g. '02/04 — Today'. NOT a tab bar.
patternB.menuInteraction: Tap Menu → fullscreen overlay with the four sections as large-type targets.
